blocks.text: "TRUTH AND NOTHING ELSE," a voice declares. "WHAT IS YOUR NAME?" Ragn. Your name is Ragn. And in your statement of citizenry - Ragn Hemlin. Uh. Right, your name. It's... one of those Norvikian names. Starts with an R. Ragn? Is that it? Don't think you're called that very often. No, you are not. Which is quite embarrassing when you think about it.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: FC8 int-Ragn?
Ragn? Hm. Doesn't sound right.
DC14 int-"Ragn Hemlin."
"Ragn."
(Stay silent.) Q

Factually correct. 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text:
Correct. 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text:
Good. Play hard to get. 
You say nothing.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Yes. That's the one.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: Doesn't sound right to me.
(Open your mouth and speak.) "Ragn."
No. No one calls you by your name. Yeah, yeah. Nobody likes you. Boo-hoo. Of course not. For you are THE CLERIC. Please stop yelling that all the time. Hey! Respect. The Helm.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: ...What?
DC12 str-The Cleric? I like that.

You are often referred to as 'Cleric'. Actually, your real name is Eric. No, hold on. It's C.L. Eric. Or something similar. No. Stop this ridiculous behavior. Your name was asked. It is RAGN. Wait! Didn't they use to call you 'Dick-Ass'? Do not use such foul language.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: DC15 dex-...'Dick-Ass'?
FC8 wis-C. L. Eric? That sounds like Cleric.
So... my name is...

Oh, hold on. That's not what it was. It was, 'Dick-Ass Rogue'. You know. Back when you hustled. On the streets. Don't bring that up. Geez. You were like, twelve. Those were dark times. Before you found the light of Urth.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text:
Ah, yes. 
That's what it was. 
Fool.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: Yes. Speak it.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: DC15 dex-"Dick-Ass Rogue." .ROGUE+=1
FC8 wis-"C.L. Eric."
DC15 str-"The Cleric." .CLERIC+=1
DC12 wis-"Cleric." .CLERIC+=1
DC14 int-"Ragn Hemlin."
"Ragn."
(Stay silent.)

NO! 
Doesn't sound that good when you say it out loud... 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text:
NO! 
Hold on. What does C.L. stand for? 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text:
Yes...! 
Well. Could be worse. 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text:
If your name is what they call you, that is it. 
Hm. Could be worse. 
You answer.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: You answer.
You say nothing.

You feel dizzy. The weight of the Urthguard uniform. A dull pain takes hold. You require HEALING. Your body aches. Its contents rotting. You must consume an apple. NOW. There are many apples here. And corpses. CORPSES? What the hells is this place? Your mind forms a trail from one cross to another. You know not why you stand among these apples. But you know everything else that has gone wrong in your life. You must dig yourself out of this trench. With kindness and an ever-brightening love for folk. Your skull is broken - the content whole. Bring yourself back from the brink. Find solace on the path and save the paladin from his madness. The flesh will thank you. Worry not of pain. Care not of hunger. The CITY needs you. It needs your bones, ground into pûlver on the pavement. Do this, and your one prayer will be answered. You have been routed for far too long. Finish this task with precision and decisiveness, regain your position at the Towers, then return to your true task. Seizing true power in this forsaken city. You really have to get yourself another job. Seriously. Once we've joined the Free Cities, you should consider leveraging your skills - become a freelancer! Or one of those well-paid corporate agents! You've already tried your hand at propaganda, and that didn't work out, so... Just take it easy. You might have failed at getting the first two- or three-hundred people to like you. But you've got half a million other folks to fool in this city! It is with utmost confidence that you know: eventually, someone has to love you. If your stats are high or low enough, Chimes will appear in your mind. They will suggest, inform, and offer unique paths. Trust them at your own risk.
blocks.speaker: reply

blocks.text: DC17 dex-"Propaganda?"
DC17 int-"Seizing power?"
DC17 str-"My bones?"
DC17 wis-"...Everything else?"
DC17 con-"The flesh?"
DC17 cha-"Love me?"
"I'm so very confused."
"Uh-huh." (Rub your temples.)
E-Okay. Thank you, voices in my head.  UpdateEntities PlayNormalMusic PlayAmbient
Yeah... it wasn't a great idea to follow your mom's footsteps.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text: It will be a long road, one you will inevitably travel. To surpass the Arcanists of old and become Wizard-God-King.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: A cheap currency in times of trouble. But you are ready to sacrifice them all - just like Urth teaches.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text:
Well. 
Let's aim for 'stand your presence' for now.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text:
That's usually the case. 
Your mind is ungodly powerful. 
Get yourself together. 
Just go to work. You know... get shit done. 
One step at a time.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: E-Get going. UpdateEntities PlayNormalMusic PlayAmbient

As you do, your fingers touch upon cold steel. It is covering your entire head. 
Colloquially known as a 'helmet'.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: Can I take it off?
E-Okay. Thank you. UpdateEntities PlayNormalMusic PlayAmbient
NO! I wouldn't do that. Like ripping off your own face. Not a good idea. Not yet. Can't wait until you do.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: It is a lot. Do not let that break your spirit. A world of redemption lies at the end. All you have to do is retain exactly that which makes you truly, and unimaginably, good.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: Your stomach yearns for the void. Do not take the Flame Tongue.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: Another question from the darkness. "WHAT IS YOUR OCCUPATION?" As if it matters. What is this, an interrogation? You are dead. Dead? How can you be dead? You're thinking, aren't you? Dead does not mean gone. ...What are you, a fucking poet? You aimed at Patriarch. More realistically, you would have ended up a Sender.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: (Look around.)
DC15 str-Please, no, I don't want to be a Sender...
DC13 con-I don't want to be dead.
What's an 'occupation' in this context? .Intro_YourClass=1
.Intro_YourClass==1-Class? What class am I?
.Intro_YourClass==1-"I have a very important job to do."
(Stay silent.) Q

It's more than darkness. It's nothing. All around you. 
Your senses reach out into the void. A glimmer, dangling far, far away. 
A STRING of EXISTENCE.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: Politics at the Towers wouldn't allow for much else, now would it?
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: Few do. If you can embrace it, do so.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: Work. Getting paid for labor. This is for sure about your job. You know. THE job. Didn't you have a job? Something really important... Your class. Tell the voice about your class.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text:
Lower class. 
Upper class. 
You are a great spellcaster who will rule the world one day. 
Occupation? Hah! Forever standing at the gates of chaos, holding the line against all things foul is no mere job. It is a calling! Destiny! 
Not sure any answer is good here. 
Just go with whatever works in the moment. 
Your class is whatever gets you to steer clear of society, in general. 
You are a city cleric. Nothing more. 
You're a high class scoundrel. The best of the best. 
And awful... at EVERYTHING.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: DC14 int-"I'm a god damn wizard." .WIZARD+=1
DC13 wis-"I'm definitely a cleric." .CLERIC+=1
DC15 str-"I am the Guardian of justice and peace. A true human hero."
DC12 dex-"I'm a sneaky little rogue." .ROGUE+=1
"I'm awful at everything."
(Stay silent.)
Indeed. Your journey has taken you far. Finally you've become the one and only... The strong and steadfast... The... the...
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: "I am The Cleric." .CLERIC+=1
YES. Embarrassing. Agreed.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: A dashing one, at that.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text: Brutal, but true. Probably shouldn't say that out loud. Putting yourself down is not a great way to get people to love you. Unless you're very manipulative about it.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Gods be damned, you are.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: Your true calling.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text:
You do. And it'll be a great payday. 
Way too important. You'll never make it out alive.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text:
Honestly, since you don't know who you're dealing with here, I agree. 
It is probably smart to shut up.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: It takes a while before the next question is posed. "WHAT IS YOUR CURRENT GOAL?" Goal? Would be nice to get out of this dark pit for one. We need to find out who blew up the tea shop. And most importantly, for what nefarious purpose. You are a hero. By divine dictate, only you can save the world. With your gift you can easily take control one day. The goblin chieftain. She needs you.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: DC15 int-Control?
DC10 wis-...A tea shop exploded?
Why all these questions?
.VL_Cryptic==1-"I am a tithe collector."
DC13 dex-"To get out of the darkness."
DC14 str-"To save the world."
DC15 int-"To rule the world."
"To find the goblin chieftain? Is that right?"
(Stay silent.) Q

Yeah, no. Giving away your personal aspirations like that could totally come back to bite you. 
Staying quiet causes a deep silence to fall upon the darkness. Until it is broken by the next question.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text:
No clue. But you should keep 'em talking. 
It's been silent here for far too long. 
This fellow wants something. No idea what, though. 
You should probably lie. Tell him you're collecting taxes or something. That'd be fun.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Yeah. That should scare 'em.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Keep looking for a way out...!
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text:
Control of everything. 
It is what you were made for.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: Unfortunately, yes.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: That's not good. I like tea shops.
Great. I hate tea shops. They should be banned.
I don't have any strong opinions on tea shops. In fact, I never think of them at all.
They are lovely, yes.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: Nothing but a hive of criminals.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: Do not lie to yourself.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text:
You may ruminate further on tea shops at a later date. 
There is a question to be answered. Your goal is...
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: They're counting on you. Keep it together.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: It is only right.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text: You know it to be true.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: No reply. No feedback.

Then the voice asks: "WHAT IS YOUR POLITICAL AFFILIATION?" The question strikes your entire consciousness, sending it spinning. This is a setup. Has to be. The National Party of Norvik, of course! Theocracy is a farce. Don't stoop so low. If you care for your fellow - vote for the Azgalists. No way. Those dwarves want to take everything from you. Which isn't much, but still. It is the... Azgalists. Yes, they are decent. Possibly. It is the duty of the powerful to lead. That is you. No one else. Don't be so self-absorbed. You are a social creature, defined by what you give. We've moved beyond the bounds of dictators. We are free to make our own choices, thanks to the Revolutionary Freestriders! The Freestriders, maybe? Then again, you're no revolutionary. Things just move way too fast these days... Elections. Are. ...Exhausting. ...Ridiculous. It hides in the back of your skull: a fact. That you are bound to be a Nationalist. And it frightens you. The pressure...
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: "The Nationalists." .NATIONALIST+=1
"The Azgalists." .AZGALIST+=1
"The Freestriders." .FREESTRIDER+=1
I don't know any of these words.
DC11 int-"I should be in charge, as a god-king wizard-lord."
DC17 con-"The Agrarians. If they were still around..." .AGRARIAN+=1
"Actually, I'm apolitical." .APOLITICAL+=1
(Stay silent.) Q
Once, we based our worth on knowledge and ability. It shall come again.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text:
Good. Together we will keep Norvik safe. For Urth and Torna! 
You conform. You follow suit. 
Do not be a nail in a world of hammers.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text:
Peace, prosperity, and fraternity. We're going to be RICH! 
This is going off the rails. Might as well hang on.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text:
Don't worry, it doesn't matter. Just say whatever you think will be the most useful to you. 
Which is, uh... 
Just say you're apolitical. 
And I think you know exactly what that is...
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Sadness. Pain. All the DIRT in our VEINS will spew out onto the world. Unconstrained. For your gut tells you one simple truth... You belong on a FARM.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: Perfection. No one can get mad at you. And everyone will love you.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text: Silence is golden. When it comes to politics, at least.
blocks.speaker: cha

blocks.text:
Life is a struggle to alleviate oppression. The exiles know this well. 
You have supported them in the past. Time to do so again. 
Last time you supported them, your life took a drastic turn. 
...Will that happen again?
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: The voice is fading. This is the end. The final question. "HOW DID YOU DIE?" Following your convictions. Drowning. In the river. Same way you lived. Unable to step out of the uniform. Not for one second. Now's your chance. Break free!
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text: "I fell into divinity. She took me whole."
"I... died when he died."
(Stay silent until the darkness ends.)
DC9 dex-"I am NOT DEAD."

... 
A fresh start.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: (Get up.) UnlockA STORY_LL

Your heartbeat is loud. Screaming. Your body aches. It's stiff, as if you've slept for days. Don't sleep in the armor, dumbass. A true man always does. Ready for your glorious quest to continue. Ready for the quest to continue.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: (Look around you.)
(Check your stuff.)
M-Wait, what's this about a quest?

A circular stone chamber. A storage for apples and corpses. 
A house of the dead. Your home. 
Those piles of apples... is this Tolstad? 
I see. Apples and corpses. 
...Get the fuck out of here. Now.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text:
What stuff? 
Your hands dart around your pouch and uniform. 
Panic. Sweat. 
You take a deep breath. Be calm. 
No spellbook, no mace... face it, you've been robbed. 
Your legs shake. Tears begin to form. 
Deep breaths. Your belongings are surely here somewhere.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: Oh yes, a QUEST! You're on a quest to save the city. Interact with highlighted words to receive a Glossary Entry. Urth be Blessed.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: DC9 str-Save the city?
Do I... remember everything?
Yes! Save it from the jaws of democracy.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: Yes. Everything is off, but your memory is intact. Uh. Not sure. Do you have some sort of amnesia? No. Just remember it. Your thoughts are scattered. But your memory is intact. Your thoughts are scattered. But your mind is fine. Your quest was given yesterday. Remember. The tea shop.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: FC10 wis-Okay. But what's the quest again?
DC10 wis-...The tea shop?
You got a job. The tea shop job.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text: ...Tea shop job?

Yep. The Tea Shop that Blew Up. 
Easy job. You'll be done in a day or two. 
It'll be a tough one. Might take days. 
A chance for REDEMPTION.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: DC13 con-Redemption? Wait, what did I do?
Just a job? Ah. So I've done this before.
A quest? I like those.
Wait, how much time do I have?
M-So, to be clear, I need to figure out who blew up some random tea shop?

Well. Maybe not this particular type of job. You... haven't really. Your previous experience lies more in some basic Urthguard militia service, as well as a few years at the Towers. Rogue sorcery was not your main subject. But yes. You've read a lot about these types of fiery events. They are not too common these days. However, this incident does not appear overly complex.
blocks.speaker: int

blocks.text:
Good attitude. There's always more around the corner, so look out. Don't want to miss any. 
They are dangerous. You might not make it.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: Until the election, duh. Which is in five days. Which is in six days. No, it's not. What the hell. It's in FIVE days. Depends on your definitions. Definitions of what? TIME? The Patriarch was very clear: handle the tea shop before election day. You must honor this request - and complete this QUEST. Time only advances when you make new choices in dialogs.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text:
Insubordination. 
Inconstancy. 
Light apostasy. 
The words live inside your bone marrow.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: More or less. But you've got like, five days to do it. So no stress. There's also bullshit politics involved here. You'll love it. You're the one they sent. You best get to work, hero. There's that feeling again. The feeling you're about to enter a path from which there is no way back.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: DC14 wis-No way back? That doesn't sound too good.
DC14 str-A hero? Me?
Can I think about this first?
Yes. Let's finish this job.
Good or bad. You won't know until you've reached the end.
blocks.speaker: wis

blocks.text: That's very ominous. I-
Can't I just not go on the-
Fate will guide me to a-
Yes. It's time to deliver it all to this wonderful city. Your duty has come. Give everything to Norvik.
blocks.speaker: str

blocks.text: Everything? I don't think-
How does that make me a-
I will carry this burden to-
Time. Is. Limited.
blocks.speaker: con

blocks.text: It's just a lot to-
Damn right! You'll do great. Now get going.
blocks.speaker: dex

blocks.text: Alright. But, first I-
